description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, open-plan layout. The exterior features a mix of natural wood paneling, large glass windows, and lush greenery integrated into the landscaping. The house is surrounded by hedges and trees, providing privacy and a connection to nature. Multiple outdoor living spaces, including patios and terraces, are visible, some partially enclosed by wooden fencing. The windows are generously sized and asymmetrically arranged, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding gardens. The main entryway is understated, blending seamlessly into the facade with minimal ornamentation and a direct path from the driveway.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, wood paneling, large glass windows, and lush landscaping. Features open outdoor spaces and an understated entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, and a driveway leading up to the house, with greenery flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive wooden fencing, lush hedges, and a large patio area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple terraces, large glass windows, and dense greenery providing privacy along the property line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible outdoor living spaces, additional windows, and a continuation of the modern landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flush door, no porch, and direct path from driveway, integrated into facade with subtle landscaping.
